name: crm-software-house
description: Software House CRM monorepo (client, server, shared).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.test:api: newman run tests/postman/CRM_API_Collection.json -e tests/postman/envs/development.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export tests/reports/api-report.html
scripts.clean: rimraf client/dist server/logs client/node_modules server/node_modules node_modules
